examples.query: Galactomannan detection for invasive aspergillosis in immunocompromised patients
examples.info:
Topic: GALACTOMANNAN DETECTION FOR INVASIVE ASPERGILLOSIS IN IMMUNOCOMPROMISED PATIENTS
BERT: immunocompromised, aspergillosis, patients, invasive, galactomannan
CLUSTERING BASED ON CONTEXTUAL EMBEDDINGS: (immunocompromised patients OR invasive OR galactomannan) AND (aspergillosis)
EXPANSION:(invasive OR cryptococcosis OR Patient immunosuppressed OR zygomycosis OR minimally-invasive OR galactomannan OR immunocompromised OR 1²-d-glucan OR immuno-compromised OR beta-d-glucan OR detections OR minimally OR detecting OR detection OR immunocompromized OR Aspergillosis) AND (aspergillosis)
examples.result: (invasive OR cryptococcosis OR Patient immunosuppressed OR zygomycosis OR minimally-invasive OR galactomannan OR immunocompromised OR 1²-d-glucan OR immuno-compromised OR beta-d-glucan OR detections OR minimally OR detecting OR detection OR immunocompromized OR Aspergillosis) AND (aspergillosis)

examples.query: Galactomannan detection for invasive aspergillosis in immunocompromised patients
examples.info: generated using TODO use better model: You are an information specialist who develops Boolean queries for systematic reviews. You have extensive experience developing highly effective queries for searching the medical literature. Your specialty is developing queries that retrieve as few irrelevant documents as possible and retrieve all relevant documents for your information need. You are able to take an information need such as: “{Thromboelastography (TEG) and rotational thromboelastometry (ROTEM) for trauma-induced coagulopathy in adult trauma patients with bleeding}” and generate valid pubmed queries such as: “{((Thrombelastogra* OR Thromboelastogra* OR (thromb* AND elastogra*) OR TEG OR haemoscope OR haemonetics) OR Thrombelastography[mh:noexp] OR (thromboelasto* OR thrombelasto* OR (thromb* AND elastom*) OR (rotational AND thrombelasto) OR ROTEM OR "tem international")) NOT (animals[mh] NOT humans[mh:noexp])}". Now you have your information need to conduct research on “{Galactomannan detection for invasive aspergillosis in immunocompromised patients}”, please generate a highly effective systematic review Boolean query for the information need.
